current_task.title: Diagnose production login outage caused by Supabase free-tier auto-pause and add a GitHub Actions keepalive guard

handoff_history.task: Fixed database idle connection timeouts (partially reverted by PR #35 PgBouncer fix)
Login-after-idle auth stabilization merged to main (PR #26) + universal handoff
Diagnose production login outage (Supabase auto-pause) + add GitHub Actions keepalive workflow

next_steps: Commit and push the new keepalive workflow plus state-file updates in a single PR.
After merge, manually trigger 'Keepalive Health Ping' once via 'Run workflow' to verify the schedule wiring before relying on cron.
Optionally set repo variable HEALTHCHECK_URL to override the default endpoint without editing YAML.
Outstanding from Task #34: run manual mobile/desktop browser regression for login-after-idle on the merged main branch.
Outstanding from Task #31: complete Phase 7 cleanup of the old Mumbai Supabase project.

plan_status.status: Production login outage diagnosed and recovered after Supabase manual restore. GitHub Actions keepalive workflow drafted to prevent recurrence; not yet committed.

cross_platform_context.key_insights: Production login was returning 404 from Koyeb infrastructure because the Supabase Frankfurt project had been auto-paused after ~26 days of inactivity. Koyeb container was crash-looping at lifespan startup (ENOTFOUND tenant/user postgres.cccuzyzcjadzpndexobv not found). User manually restored Supabase, which brought the backend back. Added a GitHub Actions cron workflow that pings /api/v1/health twice daily to keep the Supabase free-tier project active going forward. No backend or frontend source code changes were required.

task_tracking.note: TASK_LOG.md is APPEND-ONLY. SESSION_INDEX.md maps tasks to summaries.
